title: Rec Nights At Freddys 2
tagline: Anyone can survive five nights. This time, there will be no second chances.
overview: Mike and Abby head to FazFest, but Abby’s discovery of a strange device leads the animatronics to escape and terrorize the city. Now, Mike, Abby, and Vanessa must stop the nightmare before it’s too late.  “Anyone can survive five nights. This time, there will be no second chances.”
